metadata.name: Exploration Table
metadata.source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules 3e pp.80-82 — VERIFIED Mar 22, 2026
metadata.notes: Each crew member Exploring rolls once on this table.

entries.name: I know a good deal when I see one
entries.effect: Roll on the Trade Table instead

entries.name: Meet a Patron
entries.effect: You are offered a Patron job

entries.name: Must've been something I ate
entries.effect: Crew member must go to Sick Bay for 1 turn

entries.name: Meet someone interesting
entries.effect: Gain a Quest Rumor. If Precursor, roll 1D6: on 5+ gain a second Quest Rumor

entries.name: Had a nice chat
entries.effect: Roll 1D6+Savvy. On 5+ gain +1 story point

entries.name: See the sights, enjoy the view
entries.effect: No effects

entries.name: Make a new friend
entries.effect: Roll up a new character and add to crew. If Feral, the new friend is also Feral

entries.name: Time to relax
entries.effect: No effects

entries.name: Possible bargain
entries.effect: Give up a weapon. Roll 1D6: on 6 roll on the Loot Table, otherwise receive 1 credit

entries.name: Alien merchant
entries.effect: Give any item, then roll on the Loot Table

entries.name: Got yourself noticed
entries.effect: If you have Rivals, select a random one. You must fight them this campaign turn

entries.name: You hear a tip
entries.effect: You may automatically track down a Rival to fight this campaign turn

entries.name: Completely lost
entries.effect: Roll 1D6+Savvy. On 4+ find your way back. Otherwise miss the battle this turn. Roll again on this table

entries.name: Someone wants a package delivered
entries.effect: When you travel to a new world, receive 3 credits. Roll 1D6: on 1-2 gain a Rival and +1 story point

entries.name: A tech fanatic offers to help out
entries.effect: Pick a damaged item. Roll 1D6: on 5-6 it is repaired for free. If an Engineer, gain +2 XP

entries.name: Got a few drinks
entries.effect: No effects

entries.name: I don't have a gambling problem!
entries.effect: Discard 1 item

entries.name: Overheard some talk
entries.effect: Gain 1 Rumor

entries.name: Pick a fight
entries.effect: Add a Rival. If K'Erin, in first battle against them the enemy has -1 figure

entries.name: Found a trainer
entries.effect: Gain +2 XP

entries.name: Information broker
entries.effect: You may buy up to 3 Rumors for 2 credits each

entries.name: Arms dealer
entries.effect: You may purchase rolls on the Military Weapons Table for 3 credits each

entries.name: Promising lead
entries.effect: If you undertake an Opportunity mission this campaign turn, receive +3 credits upon completion

entries.name: Just needs a little love
entries.effect: Roll on the Gadget Table. Item is received damaged. If an Engineer, the item works right away

entries.name: Get in a bad fight
entries.effect: Go to Sick Bay for 1D3 turns and lose 1 item

entries.name: Offered a small job
entries.effect: Select a random enemy type. If you kill one during a battle this turn, receive 2 credits

entries.name: Offered a reward
entries.effect: Select a random terrain feature. If you reach it during a battle this turn, receive 2 credits

entries.name: You make a useful contact
entries.effect: Gain +1 to Recruit, Patron, or Track rolls next campaign turn

entries.name: Who left this lying around?
entries.effect: Receive your choice of a Handgun, Blade, Colony Rifle, or Shotgun

entries.name: This place is rather nice, really
entries.effect: Pay 1 story point or one crew member leaves the crew
